list.title: Salom!
list.code:
# Scratch: "Salom de!" bloki bilan bir xil
print("Salom!")

list.title: Ismingni so'ra
list.code:
# Scratch: "so'ra va kut" bloki bilan bir xil
ism = input("Ismingiz nima? ")
print("Salom, " + ism + "!")

list.title: Kalkulyator
list.code:
# Scratch: "+ amal" bloki bilan bir xil
a = int(input("Birinchi son: "))
b = int(input("Ikkinchi son: "))
print("Qo'shish: " + str(a + b))
print("Ayirish: " + str(a - b))
print("Ko'paytirish: " + str(a * b))

list.title: Agar...bo'lsa
Turli salomlashishlar
Takrorlash
Teskari sanash
list.code:
# Scratch: "o'zgartir" + "takrorla...gacha" bloklari bilan bir xil
son = 10
while son > 0:
    print(son)
    son = son - 1
print("Uchirish! \U0001f680")

list.title: Qaysi biri?
list.code:
# Scratch: "ro'yxatdagi element" bloki bilan bir xil
mevalar = ["olma", "apelsin", "uzum", "qulupnay", "shaftoli"]
print("Mevalar ro'yxati: " + str(mevalar))
raqam = int(input("Qaysi birini ko'rmoqchisan? (1-5): "))
print(str(raqam) + "-chi bu " + mevalar[raqam - 1] + "!")

list.title: Harflarni sana
list.code:
# Scratch: "uzunlik" bloki bilan bir xil
soz = input("Sevimli so'zingni yoz: ")
print("\"" + soz + "\" da " + str(len(soz)) + " ta harf bor!")
for harf in soz:
    print("-> " + harf)

list.title: Fol ochish
list.code:
# Scratch: "tasodifiy tanlash" bloki bilan bir xil
import random
natija = random.choice(["Juda omadli!", "Ancha omadli!", "Biroz omadli", "Omadli!", "Qayta urinib ko'r"])
print("Bugungi folingiz... " + natija + "!")

list.title: Sonni topish o'yini
list.code:
# Ko'p bloklarni birlashtirgan o'yin!
import random
javob = random.randint(1, 10)
print("1 dan 10 gacha sonni top!")

urinishlar = 0
while True:
    taxmin = int(input("Son kiriting: "))
    urinishlar = urinishlar + 1
    if taxmin == javob:
        print("To'g'ri! \U0001f389 " + str(urinishlar) + " ta urinishda topdingiz!")
        break
    elif taxmin < javob:
        print("Kattaroq!")
    else:
        print("Kichikroq!")
